_comment: PixelWave 测试矩阵：4 个不同主题。用 scripts/run_pixelwave_matrix.sh 批量提交到 ComfyUI API。

matrix.name: 01_character
matrix.positive: pixel art character sprite, brave knight with sword and shield, side view, idle pose, 16-bit RPG style, transparent background, clean pixel edges, limited color palette

matrix.name: 02_tileset
matrix.positive: pixel art tileset, top-down view, grass dirt water stone tiles, seamless 16x16 grid, vibrant nintendo style, JRPG overworld

matrix.name: 03_interior
matrix.positive: pixel art cozy interior, JRPG bedroom scene, warm lamp light, wooden floor, isometric view, detailed pixel art, 32-bit retro style

matrix.name: 04_enemy
matrix.positive: pixel art slime enemy, 4 frames walk cycle, side view, green slime, 32x32 sprite, nintendo style, retro game asset

shared.negative: blurry, photorealistic, 3d render, smooth gradient, antialiasing, low quality, watermark, signature, deformed, jpeg artifacts
